title: Update – Please Test Your Club Locker Account
excerpt: We are getting close to being able to switch our Club Booking system over to Club Locker which will hopefully offer a tighter integration with our website, better control over booking options by our staff, and a better experience on mobile. In advance of us switching over, it would be helpful if everyone could try … Read more
content:
We are getting close to being able to switch our Club Booking system over to Club Locker which will hopefully offer a tighter integration with our website, better control over booking options by our staff, and a better experience on mobile.

In advance of us switching over, it would be helpful if everyone could try to log in and see if their account is properly attached to the Edmonton Squash Club.

If you could follow the instructions in the video below and try to login to

https://clublocker.com/login

using either your Squash Alberta Club locker login credentials or using the email associated you use with your current Edmonton Squash Club account (you can get a password by clicking on the “forgot password” link on the page).

If it says “Edmonton Squash Club” in the top left-hand corner of the page when you login, then you are good to go. If it says another club, then please click on that club name which will take you to a page where you will hopefully be able to choose the Edmonton Squash Club.

If you are unable to login, or cannot seem to associate your account with the Edmonton Squash Club, then please send an email to info@edmontonsquashclub.ca and we will try to fix things up for you.
